things.name: Jellyfish Lake
things.description: Marine lake where millions of golden jellyfish have lost their sting - swim among them

things.name: Blue Corner Dive Site
things.description: World's best dive site with grey reef sharks, manta rays and a breathtaking wall

things.description: UNESCO World Heritage mushroom-shaped limestone islands with hidden coves and caves

things.name: German Channel
things.description: Famous dive site where manta rays are regularly sighted being cleaned

things.name: Palau National Museum
things.description: Traditional Palauan storyboards, artefacts and cultural history

things.name: Peleliu Battlefield
things.description: Site of WWII's bloodiest Pacific battles with tanks, aircraft and tunnels preserved

things.name: Milky Way Lagoon
things.description: Natural spa lagoon with white volcanic limestone mud used for skin treatments

things.name: Ngardmau Waterfall
things.description: Palau's tallest waterfall accessible by monorail through the jungle

things.name: Kayangel Atoll
things.description: Remote northernmost atoll with pristine reefs and a tiny traditional village

things.name: WWII Zero Fighter Wreck
things.description: Japanese Zero fighter aircraft resting in shallow water - perfect for snorkeling
